name: CM_CTRL_SLIDER_CONTINUOUS
description: Continuous value slider screen with title bar, large value display, and slider control. Value shown in large font (42px) in center area. Slider positioned at bottom (146px from top). Supports min/max/step configuration. Arrow keys adjust value, Enter confirms.
visualForm: Title bar with back arrow → large value display (42px) in center → slider control (244px width) at bottom (y=146)
descriptionKo: 타이틀 바, 대형 값 표시(42px), 슬라이더 컨트롤을 갖춘 연속 값 슬라이더 화면입니다. min/max/step 설정과 방향키 조작을 지원하며 Enter 키로 값을 확인합니다.
descriptionEn: Continuous value slider screen with title bar, large value display, and slider control. Value shown in large font (42px) in center area. Slider positioned at bottom (146px from top). Supports min/max/step configuration. Arrow keys adjust value, Enter confirms.
